card_name_verified: Amazon Visa (Chase, $0 AF, no Prime requirement)
_review_reason: Non-Prime version: 3% Amazon/Whole Foods (vs Prime Visa's 5%), 2% gas/restaurants/transit, 1% other. Pure earnings, no statement credits. Same Aug 2026 transition note as biz versions (Amex partnership ending; consumer cards transitioning is separate from biz transition timeline).
